dashboard.title: Security Operations Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Monitor real-time threat detection and auto-response workflows at a glance.

items.title: High-risk scan traffic blocked
items.detail: Automatic containment was applied to 3 external IP addresses.

items.title: Collector latency detected
items.detail: Latency from collectors in the Seoul region crossed the threshold.

items.title: Response playbook completed
items.detail: The credential-theft mitigation playbook finished successfully.

auth.welcome: Welcome to the Sniper TMS Console
auth.subtitle: Sign in to access your tenant security operations portal.
auth.sessionLimitConfirm: Do you want to force-close existing sessions and continue login?
auth.errorLocked: Account locked due to too many failed attempts. Try again in {{clock}}.
auth.lockReleased: Account unlocked. Please sign in again.
auth.tenantExpirySoon: ⚠ Subscription Expiry Notice: Expires in {{days}} day(s). (Expiry date: {{date}}) Please contact your administrator to renew the subscription.
auth.tagline:
Correlate distributed security events in real time with an AI engine.
Trigger automated response playbooks the moment threats are detected.

features.realtime: AI-powered real-time network behavior analytics and anomaly tracking
features.isolation: Tenant-isolated protection for logs, policies, and sessions

bootstrap.required: You must register the first tenant administrator before login.
bootstrap.title: Tenant First Admin Registration
bootstrap.subtitle: Register the first operator using a one-time token issued by Master Admin.
bootstrap.success: First admin registration completed. Redirecting to login.
bootstrap.errorFailed: Failed to register first admin. Please check token and input values.

resetPassword.title: Tenant Admin Password Reset
resetPassword.subtitle: Change your password using the issued reset token.
resetPassword.passwordPolicy: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
resetPassword.success: Password reset completed. Redirecting to login.
resetPassword.errorPasswordTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters long.
resetPassword.errorPasswordMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.
resetPassword.errorFailed: Password reset failed. Please check token and input values.

collectors.title: Collector Management
collectors.apiKeyWarning: API Key (shown only once — save it immediately!)

alerts.title: Alert List
alerts.description: Create security alerts and manage status, notification policy, and delivery history.

policy.title: Notification Policy
policy.recipientsHelp: Separate values with commas. Example: soc@acme.com, #soc-alerts

errors.createFailed: An error occurred while creating alert.
errors.statusFailed: An error occurred while updating alert status.
errors.policyFailed: An error occurred while saving notification policy.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage IP whitelist, parsing rules, and branding settings.

errors.saveFailed: An error occurred while saving parsing rule.
errors.deactivateFailed: An error occurred while deactivating parsing rule.

authSettings.title: Auth Settings
authSettings.description: Configure login lockout, concurrent sessions, and auto logout policies.
authSettings.saveFailed: An error occurred while saving auth settings.

validation.autoLogoutTimeoutMinutes: Auto logout timeout must be 0 or between 1 and 30 minutes.

lockMinutes.label: Lock time (minutes)
lockMinutes.help: Default 5 min, minimum 3 min, maximum 30 min

autoLogoutTimeoutMinutes.label: Auto logout timeout (minutes)
autoLogoutTimeoutMinutes.help: Default 5 min, minimum 1 min, maximum 30 min, 0 means no timeout

users.title: User Management
users.description: Manage tenant user accounts and roles.

errors.saveFailed: An error occurred while saving user.
errors.deactivateFailed: An error occurred while deactivating user.

sessionTimeout.dialogMessage: For security, you will be logged out soon. Extend your session to continue.

serverError.title: A server connection problem occurred
serverError.description: A server error occurred while processing your request. Please try again shortly or move to the dashboard.

topbar.tip: Use (cmd + click) to open a tab

notifications.title: Live Notifications
notifications.securitySpikeBody: Anomalous traffic patterns increased sharply in the last 15 minutes.
notifications.ingestionDelayBody: Average ingestion delay has been detected on 2 collectors.
notifications.playbookBody: A containment playbook has been executed for a high-severity event.
